class.name: SlangModule
class.brief_description: The granularity of shader code compilation and loading.
class.description: A module is the granularity of shader code compilation and loading. Can be created from a [SlangSession]. In most cases a module corresponds to a single compilation "translation unit." This will often be a single Slang or HLSL file and everything it [code]#include[/code]s. See the [url=https://shader-slang.org/docs/compilation-api/]Slang documentation[/url] for more information.

method.name: find_and_check_entry_point
method.description: Find and validate an entry point by name, even if the function is not marked with the [code][shader(...)][/code] attribute.

method.name: find_entry_point
method.description: Find and an entry point by name. Note that this does not work in case the function is not explicitly designated as an entry point using the [code][shader(...)][/code] attribute.

method.name: get_defined_entry_point
method.description: Get the defined entry-point at [param index].

method.name: get_defined_entry_point_count
method.description: Get number of entry points defined in the module.

method.name: get_dependency_files
method.description: Get the dependency file paths of this module.

method.name: get_params_shape
method.description: Emits reflection information for this module's program layout as a [StructTypeLayoutShape].

method.name: to_json
method.description: Emits reflection information for this module's program layout in JSON format.

members.member: The diagnostic associated with attempting to load this module, if the module failed to load.
